title: Image Plan
description: Produced at Stage 7 and extended at Stage 8. Defines every visual asset required for production: its sourcing strategy, legal status, AI generation prompt, and approval status. Each image maps to one or more scenes in scene.json. No scene with source_type=AI_GENERATE or STOCK_LICENSED may be edited without a corresponding approved image in this document.

image_count.description: Total images. Must equal length of images array.

ai_image_tool.description: Primary AI image generation tool for this project. Null if not yet decided.

sensitive_scene_ids.description: Image IDs that require mandatory human review before use. Includes any scene depicting sensitive historical periods.

global_style.description: Style constants applied to all AI-generated images in this project.

global_negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt applied to ALL AI images in addition to per-image negatives.
examples: bright colors, clear sky, sunlight, modern logos, text overlays, watermarks

image_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: IMG001... IMG999. Subimages: IMG011a.

scene_refs.description: Scene IDs this image serves. Usually one, but may cover multiple scenes.

stock_search_required.description: If true, attempt licensed stock sourcing before AI generation.

stock_agencies.description: Ordered list of stock agencies to check.

description_en.description: English description of the image for sourcing and generation.

style_notes.description: Style direction specific to this image.

priority.description: HIGH = required before edit lock. MEDIUM = preferred. LOW = optional/replaceable.

sensitive_content.description: True if this image depicts or implies sensitive historical events. Triggers mandatory_human_review.

mandatory_human_review.description: If true, a human must approve this image before it can be used in the edit.

human_review_criteria.description: What specifically the human reviewer must check. Required when mandatory_human_review=true.

fallback_image_id.description: If this image fails review or generation, use this image ID instead.

approval_status.description: Set during production. All images must be approved before timeline assembly.

file_path.description: Relative path to generated/sourced file. Null until produced.

ai_prompt.description: Null for non-AI images. Required when legal_status=AI_GENERATE.

seed.description: Reproducibility seed. Set after successful generation.

max_reject_attempts.description: How many times to regenerate before falling back to fallback_image_id.

global_style.global_negative_prompt: people, text, logos, bright colors, clear sky, sunlight, watermarks, modern signage

images.legal_status_reason: Best atmospheric angles require private access. Real photos exist but usage rights unclear.
images.description_en: Hashima Island wide shot from sea level. Grey overcast sky. Concrete ruins visible above seawall. Mist on water.
images.style_notes: Cinematic. Dark. Desaturated. The island should feel large and looming.

ai_prompt.positive: Abandoned concrete island rising from the sea, overcast grey sky, mist on the water, crumbling multi-story buildings visible above a weathered seawall, dramatic low angle view from sea level, cinematic wide shot, desaturated color palette, film grain, moody and atmospheric, dark documentary style
ai_prompt.negative: people, text, logos, bright colors, clear weather, tropical

images.notes: Opening image of entire video. Must seek real photography first.

images.legal_status_reason: Underground mine interior — no public access.
images.description_en: Abstract mine tunnel interior. Rock walls. Single dim light source. Sense of depth and darkness. No people.
images.style_notes: Noir lighting. Narrow perspective. Abstract and atmospheric ONLY.

ai_prompt.positive: Abstract mine tunnel interior, narrow passage disappearing into darkness, single dim light source casting harsh shadows on rough rock walls, deep shadow, noir lighting, oppressive atmosphere, cinematic close-up perspective
ai_prompt.negative: people, silhouettes, figures, human shadows, implied human presence, human shapes, bodies, modern equipment, text

images.human_review_criteria: Inspect for any human form, silhouette, shadow readable as human, or implied human body shape. If found → REJECT. Do not use. Do not modify. Regenerate. If rejection occurs 3 consecutive times → use fallback_image_id.
images.notes: CRITICAL: This scene covers forced labor era (1939-1945). Atmospheric ONLY. No human depictions under any circumstances.
